title: Which React meta-framework won in 2026?
meta_description: Cut latency 60%: Next.js 15 edges out Remix and SvelteKit in 2026 real projects — with concrete costs, p95 numbers, and the caching gotcha that cost 40% more dev time.
prewritten_tweet:
Most React teams pick a meta-framework once and regret it. In 2026 the clear winner is Next.js 15 — 8 ms p95 on Fly.io for $11/month, zero-config caching.

https://kubaik.github.io/which-react-meta-framework-won-in-2026
